overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban downtown. The camera follows the character from a third-person perspective as they ascend from a sunken plaza, cross open streets with towering skyscrapers, and enter covered walkways with heavy traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken urban plaza with neon advertisements

events.description: ascends wide concrete stairs from sunken plaza to street level

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs from lower plaza while observing neon-lit surroundings and wet reflective ground

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing geometric umbrella ascending stairs ahead

entered.detail: tall vertical neon light strip glowing bright pink
large curved wall of digital screens displaying colorful advertisements
rain-slicked concrete ground reflecting pink and blue neon lights
wide stairs leading up from sunken plaza to street level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a sunken urban plaza with wet concrete reflecting vibrant neon lights. The character ascends a wide set of stairs toward street level, passing a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella. Digital billboards tower in the background while a pink neon pillar stands prominently on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to view massive overhead neon arch and skyscraper facades
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza while looking up at the massive architecture and overhead structures

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the wet asphalt street

entered.detail: massive overhead structural arch with shifting rainbow neon lights
tall building with multiple vertical digital billboards displaying advertisements
industrial crane visible against the sky between buildings

segments.scene_description: Having reached street level, the character walks across an open intersection surrounded by towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive overhead neon arch shifting through rainbow colors. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt as digital billboards illuminate the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with digital advertisements

events.description: enters covered walkway area with overhead concrete structure

agents.ego_description: walking through busy commercial district following pedestrian traffic toward covered area

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer walking ahead wearing dark jacket with police markings

entered.detail: red building facade with circular windows and vertical neon light strips
tall cylindrical pillar wrapped in digital screens showing product advertisements
entrance to covered pedestrian walkway with overhead concrete structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling commercial pedestrian street lined with red buildings and digital advertisement pillars. Following an NCPD officer, the scene transitions toward a covered walkway entrance as the sky becomes partially obscured by overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with adjacent traffic

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway alongside moving traffic with neon-lit walls

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with headlights on driving past the walkway

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with integrated cyan and purple neon light strips
wall of illuminated advertisement posters with cyberpunk imagery
black and yellow striped barrier separating walkway from traffic

segments.scene_description: Now fully under cover, the character walks through a neon-lit underpass with concrete ceilings and digital poster walls. Vehicles pass by on the right side separated by a striped barrier, while the artificial lighting creates a moody cyberpunk atmosphere distinct from the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a sunken neon plaza into the sprawling, covered arteries of a futuristic downtown. It begins in a low-lying urban square with wet concrete reflecting vibrant lights, moving upward along a wide set of stairs past a glowing umbrella toward the street level. As the character reaches the intersection, the scene opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers and a massive, rainbow-shifting neon arch overhead while futuristic vehicles glide across the rain-slicked asphalt. The camera then follows the character through a bustling commercial street lined with red buildings and digital pillars, transitioning from the open sky toward the mouth of a covered walkway. Finally, the environment shifts into a moody, enclosed underpass where concrete ceilings and digital poster walls replace the open cityscape, with traffic flowing beside a striped barrier.
